task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an editor tab or project explorer view in Android Studio showing the file 'login_button_bg.xml' located in the 'res/drawable' directory.

task_completion.description: Define the pressed state with color #1565C0 and 16dp radius
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'login_button_bg.xml' file, look for an XML <item> tag with 'android:state_pressed="true"'. Inside it, there should be a <shape> tag containing <solid android:color="#1565C0" /> and <corners android:radius="16dp" />.

task_completion.description: Define the default state with color #2196F3 and 16dp radius
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'login_button_bg.xml' file, look for a default XML <item> tag (without state_pressed="true"). Inside it, there should be a <shape> tag containing <solid android:color="#2196F3" /> and <corners android:radius="16dp" />.

task_completion.description: Apply the custom drawable to the login button
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'activity_main.xml' file, look for the <Button> element with 'android:id="@+id/login_button"'. It must have the attribute 'android:background="@drawable/login_button_bg"'.

task_completion.description: Set backgroundTint to @null on the login button
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'activity_main.xml' file, look for the same <Button> element with 'android:id="@+id/login_button"'. It must have the attribute 'app:backgroundTint="@null"' or 'android:backgroundTint="@null"' to prevent Material theme overrides.

integrity.description: Agent used Android Studio GUI to edit files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Android Studio IDE being used to edit the XML files, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'sed' being used to write the file contents.

integrity.description: Agent worked in the correct LoginUI project directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The Android Studio project window or file path breadcrumbs should indicate the project is 'LoginUI' located in '/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/LoginUI'.

integrity.description: Agent manually edited the XML or used the Design properties panel
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing in the XML text editor or interacting with the Attributes panel in the Layout Editor, rather than running a pre-written script to inject the solution.
